serviceNotes.engine oil: Opel’s EU maintenance schedule for Corsa F specifies service including oil and filter every 30,000 km or 1 year, whichever comes first.
serviceNotes.cabin filter: Interior ventilation filter replacement is specified at 60,000 km / 2 years in Opel’s maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.air filter: Engine air filter replacement at 60,000 km / 4 years per the Opel periodic maintenance plan.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Fuel filter replacement at 60,000 km / 2 years (diesel models) per the Opel service schedule.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Preventive coolant exchange around 120,000 km maintains corrosion protection for turbocharged CMP engines.
serviceNotes.wet belt inspection: Where fitted (PureTech-related engines), wet belt systems need specialist inspection around 100,000 km; confirm engine variant.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Opel specifies brake fluid replacement every 2 years, approximately every 60,000 km on the standard schedule.
serviceNotes.check brake pads: Brake pad inspection is part of the Opel periodic service programme.
